name: extrachill/image-voting
title: Image Voting Block
description: Allow users to vote on images with email capture.

voteCount.description: DEPRECATED (issue #13): votes are now stored as image_vote comments. Kept only so the one-time backfill (wp extrachill-content-blocks backfill-image-votes) can read historical counts. Remove from block.json after backfill + post_content cleanup are confirmed in production.

voters.description: DEPRECATED (issue #13): voter emails are now stored in wp_comments (image_vote type) and never rendered. Kept only for the one-time backfill to read historical voter emails. Remove from block.json after backfill + post_content cleanup are confirmed in production.
